'''Gukandar Huath''' was a [[Warleader]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He was noteworthy in his religious views: he cared only for [[Yun-Yammka]], and was indifferent toward [[Yun-Yuuzhan]].

{{Char-stub}}
